name: BoxDetectorSDK Windows Build
postCreateCommand: powershell -Command "mkdir C:\deps; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://github.com/opencv/opencv/releases/download/4.9.0/opencv-4.9.0-windows.exe' -OutFile 'C:\deps\opencv.exe'; Start-Process -FilePath 'C:\deps\opencv.exe' -ArgumentList '-oC:\deps\opencv -y' -Wait -NoNewWindow; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/releases/download/v1.17.0/onnxruntime-win-x64-1.17.0.zip' -OutFile 'C:\deps\onnxruntime.zip'; Expand-Archive -Path 'C:\deps\onnxruntime.zip' -DestinationPath 'C:\deps' -Force"
